data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The design simplifies user choices to minimize decision time.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes progressive disclosure of information and choice filtering.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and positioned to be easily accessible for user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Primary controls are larger and positioned in intuitive hotspots.

data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: The interface is designed to offer a simple, clean, and minimal aesthetic.
data.technical_spec: Adopts whitespace and a minimalist approach to design.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Promotes visual grouping and hierarchy to guide the user's navigation experience.
data.technical_spec: Usage of proximity, similarity, and continuity in visual design.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: System feedback is clear and immediate to let users know their actions are registered.
data.technical_spec: Real-time notifications and visual response for inputs.
